link.name: Github Release Modern Variant APK (File Download Link)
Github Release Legacy Variant APK (File Download Link)

releaseNote.zh-cn:
1. 分发 注意！自该版本起，签名已被更换；请卸载后重装或使用 Intermediate 过渡包完成升级！
  2. 分发 最低要求升至 Android 8 (API 26)，Legacy 版本除外
  3. 改进 支持禁用历史记录
  4. 开发 使用 SDK 37 构建
  5. 开发 使用 Gradle 9.5.1 构建, 使用 AGP 9.2.1 构建
  6. 开发 更新依赖
releaseNote.en:
1. Distribution: IMPORTANT! since the version, we replaced our signing key, as a breaking change. You need to uninstall first or use Intermediate variant; see related instructions to migrate or transit.
  2. Distribution: raise minimal requirement to Android 8 (API 26), except for Legacy variant
  3. Improve: support disabling history
  4. Development: build with SDK 37
  5. Development: build with Gradle 9.5.1, build with AGP 9.2.1
  6. Development: update dependencies

link.name: Github Release Modern Variant APK (File Download Link)
Github Release Legacy Variant APK (File Download Link)

releaseNote.zh-cn:
1. 修复 因路径查找失败导致的恢复播放列表、播放文件夹或外部文件时崩溃的问题
  2. 修复 部分设备上切回前台后偶尔全部标签页消失
  3. 开发 将图片缓存机制迁移至新数据库
  4. 开发 更新依赖
releaseNote.en:
1. Fix: crash when restoring playlists and playing folders or external files, due to path lookup failures
  2. Fix: occasionally all tabs disappearing when returning to the foreground on some devices
  3. Development: migrate image cache mechanism to new database
  4. Development: update dependencies

link.name: Github Release Modern Variant APK (File Download Link)
Github Release Legacy Variant APK (File Download Link)

releaseNote.zh-cn:
1. 修改 默认启用多重艺术家和多重流派解析（从实验性功能转正）
  2. 修改 调整部分默认设置，并重组设置分类
  3. 修改 默认创建数据库播放列表
  4. 新增 桌面小部件支持深色模式
  5. 优化 支持在夜间模式下使用另一套配色方案
  6. 优化 支持跳过流派解析与同步
  7. 优化 内部数据库同步性能
  8. 翻译 更新 巴西葡萄牙语（Ricardo）、荷兰语（Polovinci）
  9. 开发 适配 SDK API 36 (Android 16)
  10. 开发 升级 AGP 至 9.1.0
releaseNote.en:
1. Modify: Multiple artists and genres parsing is now enabled by default (graduated from experimental)
  2. Modify: change some default settings, and reorganized settings pages
  3. Modify: create database playlists by default
  4. New: add dark mode support for widgets
  5. Improve: support using another color scheme for night
  6. Improve: support skipping genres parsing and synchronization
  7. Improve: performance of internal database synchronization
  8. Translation: update Portuguese Brazilian (by Ricardo), Dutch (by Polovinci)
  9. Development: targeting SDK API 36 (Android 16)
  10. Development: upgrade AGP to 9.1.0

releaseNote.zh-cn:
1. 改进 搜索输入防抖处理
  2. 改进 防止提取元数据失败时错误消息泛滥
  3. 开发 更新 Kotlin 至 2.3.20, 更新依赖
releaseNote.en:
1. Improve: search input debouncing for better responsiveness
  2. Improve: merging and throttling error notifications about background metadata extraction
  3. Development: upgrade Kotlin to 2.3.20, update dependencies
